# Proverbs 21

## Verses (31)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | The king's heart in the hands of the Lord is like the water streams, and by him it is turned in any direction at his pleasure. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Every way of a man seems right to himself, but the Lord is the tester of hearts. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | To do what is right and true is more pleasing to the Lord than an offering. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | A high look and a heart of pride, *** of the evil-doer is sin. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | The purposes of the man of industry have their outcome only in wealth; but one who is over-quick in acting will only come to be in need. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | He who gets stores of wealth by a false tongue, is going after what is only breath, and searching for death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | By their violent acts the evil-doers will be pulled away, because they have no desire to do what is right. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Twisted is the way of him who is full of crime; but as for him whose heart is clean, his work is upright. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | It is better to be living in an angle of the house-top, than with a bitter-tongued woman in a wide house. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | The desire of the evil-doer is fixed on evil: he has no kind feeling for his neighbour. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | When the man of pride undergoes punishment, the simple man gets wisdom; and by watching the wise he gets knowledge. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | The Upright One, looking on the house of the evil-doer, lets sinners be overturned to their destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | He whose ears are stopped at the cry of the poor, will himself get no answer to his cry for help. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | By a secret offering wrath is turned away, and the heat of angry feelings by money in the folds of the robe. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | It is a joy to the good man to do right, but it is destruction to the workers of evil. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | The wanderer from the way of knowledge will have his resting-place among the shades. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | The lover of pleasure will be a poor man: the lover of wine and oil will not get wealth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | The evil-doer will be given as a price for the life of the good man, and the worker of deceit in the place of the upright. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | It is better to be living in a waste land, than with a bitter-tongued and angry woman. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | There is a store of great value in the house of the wise, but it is wasted by the foolish man. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | He who goes after righteousness and mercy will get life, righteousness, and honour. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | A wise man goes up into the town of the strong ones, and overcomes its strength in which they put their faith. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | He who keeps watch over his mouth and his tongue keeps his soul from troubles. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | The man of pride, lifted up in soul, is named high-hearted; he is acting in an outburst of pride. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | The desire of the hater of work is death to him, for his hands will do no work. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | All the day the sinner goes after his desire: but the upright man gives freely, keeping nothing back. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | The offering of evil-doers is disgusting: how much more when they give it with an evil purpose! | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | A false witness will be cut off, ... | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | The evil-doer makes his face hard, but as for the upright, he gives thought to his way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | Wisdom and knowledge and wise suggestions are of no use against the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | The horse is made ready for the day of war, but power to overcome is from the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
